question: Which of the following statements is best supported by the chart?

options.A: The chart does not show how high the index in the last year really is, because it goes beyond the visible scale.
options.B: The index was highest in the first year.
options.D: The index is the same in the first and the last year.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is below the data maximum, so the top bars are truncated and appear equal.
